scheme_name: Aditya Birla SL Manufacturing Equity Fund (G)
amc: Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund
basis: GROSS holdings-implied total-return excess vs the SEBI-category benchmark (pre-cost, pre-cash-drag, pre-factor-deflation); domestic equity sleeve only, month-end snapshots. ‘Holding-rank IC’ is a cap-tilt-contaminated proxy, not pure active-weight selection (needs point-in-time benchmark weights).
